mapper.select: SELECT * FROM market_quote_realtime WHERE product_id = #{productId} ORDER BY quote_time DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO market_quote_realtime ( product_id, quote_time, price, prev_close, pct_chg, volume, amount, iopv, premium_rate, open_price, high_price, low_price, source, created_at ) VALUES ( #{productId}, #{quoteTime}, #{price}, #{prevClose}, #{pctChg}, #{volume}, #{amount}, #{iopv}, #{premiumRate}, #{openPrice}, #{highPrice}, #{lowPrice}, #{source}, NOW() ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE price = VALUES(price), prev_close = VALUES(prev_close), pct_chg = VALUES(pct_chg), volume = VALUES(volume), amount = VALUES(amount), iopv = VALUES(iopv), premium_rate = VALUES(premium_rate), open_price = VALUES(open_price), high_price = VALUES(high_price), low_price = VALUES(low_price)
mapper.update: UPDATE market_quote_realtime SET price = #{price}, prev_close = #{prevClose}, pct_chg = #{pctChg}, volume = #{volume}, amount = #{amount}, iopv = #{iopv}, premium_rate = #{premiumRate}, open_price = #{openPrice}, high_price = #{highPrice}, low_price = #{lowPrice} WHERE id = #{id}
